description_long: This bird features a streamlined body with a predominantly dark, almost black, plumage accented by vibrant turquoise and teal patches on its wings, back, and head. There are also noticeable yellow highlights on the lower flanks, adding a striking contrast to the otherwise cool-toned coloration. The beak is slender and pointed, well-suited for picking insects or fruit. The eyes are small and pale, blending subtly into the head. The legs and feet are short and dark, mostly hidden beneath the body. The tail is straight and moderately long, tapering to a subtle point.
description: A sleek bird with dark plumage, turquoise and teal highlights, yellow flanks, and a pointed beak.
description_view_0: Side view showing the bird's streamlined body, turquoise and yellow highlights, and pointed beak.
description_view_1: Rear view emphasizing the bird's tapered tail and the concentration of turquoise on the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the turquoise and yellow pattern, with the beak and head profile visible.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the bird's head, beak, and the symmetrical turquoise pattern on the crown.
attribute_plumage_pattern: solid dark base with bold turquoise and teal patches, and yellow highlights on the flanks
